content.en:
The Lord of the Dragon Shadow Palace said: "Our Heavenly Emperor Palace has a supreme treasure, called the Gate of the Stone Pupil, once we enter the Gate of the Stone Pupil, if we cultivate in it, after 100 million years, only a moment has passed in the outside world, and we can open a total of 100,000 instants. The Gate of Stone Pupils is made by using the eyeballs of the forbidden creature Stone Pupil Beast, and there are originally a total of seven stone pupils on the Gate of Stone Pupils, and each time it is used, one stone pupil will be consumed. At the beginning, the first generation of Heavenly Emperor used the Gate of Stone Pupils, and the second generation of Heavenly Emperor Hao Hai Ancestor also used the Gate of Stone Pupils. In short, you must have a great contribution to use the Stone Pupil Gate. Now, there are still three stone pupils on the door of the stone pupils, which are easy to use. But this is an extraordinary time, and we are ready to use the Stone Pupil Gate once!"

The Gate of Stone Eyes!

Many palace masters were shocked, they didn't expect that there was such a treasure in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and they didn't know it before.

The White Tiger Palace Lord was not surprised, he knew the Gate of the Stone Pupil, after all, he was the son of the Ancestor of the Great Sea, although he was only one of the many heirs, but he was also the most accomplished heir, so he knew many secrets.

However, he had never seen the Gate of the Stone Pupil, because the Gate of the Stone Pupil was too precious, and it was one of the real hole cards of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, except for the Ancestor of the Great Sea, no one else was allowed to enter the Gate of the Stone Pupil to cultivate.

Moreover, other people can't enter the Gate of Stone Pupils without permission, because when entering the Gate of Stone Pupils, they must make a natal oath, not because of selfishness to enter the Gate of Stone Pupils, this is also to prevent a certain generation of Heavenly Emperors from abusing the Gate of Stone Pupils, causing the Gate of Stone Pupils to become an abandoned thing.

"Where is the Gate of the Stone Pupil?"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord was curious.

The other palace masters also looked at the Dragon Shadow Palace Master, waiting for the Dragon Shadow Palace Master's answer.

"It's okay to tell you!" said the Dragon Shadow Palace Master: "The Gate of the Stone Pupil is not in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, because the time rules contained in the stone pupils above the Gate of the Stone Pupils are too powerful, and ordinary formations cannot cover the power of the time rules of the stone pupils at all. If it is placed in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, it will be easy for everyone to find out, and in that case, the Gate of the Stone Pupil will no longer be a secret. Therefore, the Gate of the Stone Pupil is hidden in a special space-time realm, and this space-time realm is fused with the long river of space-time in the vast sea realm. At the beginning, one-third of the vast sea boundary was cut off, and the long river of time and space was also cut off. Now, that Stone Pupil Time and Space Realm should have merged into the long river of time and space of the Xuan Xuan Ancient Realm, and it was constantly moving. If you don't have a special way, you won't be able to find that space-time realm!"

At this time, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord spoke: "The secret technique of locating the realm of time and space can only be known by our five palace masters, and the three palace masters must work together to determine the location of the realm of time and space, and it is precisely because of this that our five palace masters are easily unrealistic, otherwise once more than three of them fall, that realm of time and space will be completely gone!"

But soon, they had a question, who should they let enter the Stone Pupil Gate to practice?

"I choose to give up, my potential is exhausted, even if I enter the Stone Pupil Gate to practice, I am not sure that I will cultivate to the realm of unity!"

Subsequently, the Sky Palace Master also chose to give up, because he couldn't cultivate to the One Realm.

Although the Gate of the Stone Pupil could greatly increase their cultivation speed and give them countless time, if they didn't have the potential themselves, even if they were given endless time, it would be difficult for them to ascend to the One Realm.

Theoretically, a half-step domain ancestor can impact the domain ancestor level, but it is only theoretical.

It would be too stupid if many half-step Domain Ancestors really thought that they could impact to the Domain Ancestor level one hundred percent.

Many half-step domain ancestors have been cultivating for a long time, so long that their will has begun to doubt themselves, and the Dao heart has collapsed, this kind of thing is not nothing.

Some half-step domain ancestors hid in a no-man's land, cultivating for hundreds of billions of cosmic years, and as a result, the Dao heart collapsed, fell and died.

Therefore, most of the half-step domain ancestors had no hope of becoming domain ancestors at all.

"Dragon Shadow Palace Master, you are the most powerful, and you still have potential, if you enter the Gate of the Stone Pupil, you should be able to become a Unified Realm, not even an ordinary Unified Realm!" the Thunder Tribulation Palace Lord suggested.

The next thing is to vote, whether to let the Dragon Shadow Palace Master go.

And the Heavenly Punishment Palace Master also wants to go in, after all, this is a big opportunity!

But in the end, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord had the most supporters and got the opportunity to enter.

......

The Dragon Shadow Palace Master, the Thunder Tribulation Palace Master, the Heavenly Punishment Palace Master, the Xuan Tortoise Palace Master, the Sky Palace Master, and the Five Palace Masters all performed secret techniques to connect the time and space realm in the long river of time and space, so that they could be located almost 100%.

Rumble!!!!

Time and space oscillated, and a space-time channel appeared.

In the perception of many palace masters, a realm of time and space stands in the long river of time and space.

They even saw a vast sea stone gate standing in the middle of the space-time realm through the realm of time and space.

This stone gate is the gate of the stone pupils, and there are seven huge stone pupils on it, four of which have been closed, and only three stone pupils that exude forbidden rules remain.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord walked into the space-time passage, entered the realm of space-time, and then entered the gate of the stone pupil.

When the Dragon Shadow Palace Master completely entered the Gate of the Stone Pupil, the Gate of the Stone Pupil closed, and a stone pupil began to slowly close.

Moment!

Two moments!

Three moments!

......

Time passed slowly, and for other palace masters, this time was very short, but every moment that passed, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master was equivalent to countless years of penance in the Stone Pupil Gate.

Unconsciously, 10,000 moments passed, and a stone pupil was completely closed, losing its regular fluctuations, and becoming a closed ordinary stone pupil.

Click!!

The door of the stone pupil opened, and a figure that exuded loneliness, indifference, and rage walked out.

"It's finally out!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord sighed.

I've been cultivating in a dim space, it's too lonely and tormenting.

If he hadn't been able to feel the progress, he wouldn't have been able to sustain it.

But the end result is good!

He broke through, and both the Forbidden Dao and the physical body reached the ultimate perfection of the realm of all things, completed the unification of all things, and realized the complete transformation of the body, and the forbidden body also reached the level of refining of ninety percent and seven.

In addition, three of his forbidden Dao techniques have reached the Dacheng realm, and the others have all reached the Xiaocheng peak realm.

It can be said that he is already a real Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and he is not a weak Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, but a relatively powerful Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

Even if he encounters the top Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, he can still fight if he can't beat it, so that he won't have no power to resist, and he won't be easily killed.

"Congratulations to the Dragon Shadow Palace Master!"

Many palace masters congratulated one by one.
